v1.letter_excerpt: We believe the MRI was important and necessary given the circumstances of the fall. We ask that you reconsider the denial and cover the imaging cost...

v3.letter_excerpt: A suspected scaphoid fracture with negative X-rays is a recognized orthopedic emergency — avascular necrosis is the documented consequence of a missed diagnosis. The treating physician referred to the adjacent imaging center based on immediate clinical need, with no practical window to obtain a Network Exception authorization...

what_changed: Earlier drafts asked for reconsideration without naming the specific clinical consequence of delay, leaving the urgency argument implicit.
The improved version names avascular necrosis specifically, which establishes the urgency threshold that triggers the prior authorization exception.
